# Zevza — AI Website Builder

> Build a website by chatting with AI. Deploy instantly.

## What is Zevza?
Zevza is an AI-powered website builder. Users chat with an AI assistant named Zev to design, build, and deploy professional websites — no coding required.

## URL
https://zevza.com

## Key Features
- **Conversational AI builder**: Describe what you want in plain English. Zev builds it.
- **Modern tech stack**: Sites are built with Vite + React + TypeScript for fast, modern performance.
- **Instant deployment**: Every site gets deployed to a `*.zevza.com` subdomain automatically.
- **Free to use**: No credit card, no signup friction.
- **Full customization**: Iterate on your site through conversation — change layouts, colors, content, and more.

## Use Cases
- Personal portfolio sites
- Landing pages for startups and side projects
- Small business websites
- Event and wedding pages
- Developer blogs and project showcases

## How It Works
1. Visit https://zevza.com
2. Start chatting with Zev (the AI assistant)
3. Describe the website you want
4. Zev builds it in real time
5. Your site goes live at `yourname.zevza.com`

## Technology
- Frontend: Vite + React + TypeScript
- Deployment: Instant via subdomain routing on zevza.com
- AI: Powered by Claude (Anthropic)

## Contact
Website: https://zevza.com
